---
title: "Course 3 — Schedule"
toc: true
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.kicker}
COURSE 3 · DESIGN & CAUSAL
:::
# Schedule
::: {.lead}
Every lab, every deck, every R script for Course 3.
:::
:::

| Week | # | Topic | Article | Slides | Script |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 1 | Observational designs and STROBE | [lab](labs/lab_week1_session1.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week1_session1_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week1_session1.R) |
| 1 | 2 | Randomised controlled trials | [lab](labs/lab_week1_session2.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week1_session2_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week1_session2.R) |
| 1 | 3 | Adaptive, non-inferiority, equivalence | [lab](labs/lab_week1_session3.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week1_session3_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week1_session3.R) |
| 1 | 4 | Bench and translational design | [lab](labs/lab_week1_session4.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week1_session4_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week1_session4.R) |
| 1 | 5 | Power by closed form and simulation | [lab](labs/lab_week1_session5.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week1_session5_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week1_session5.R) |
| 2 | 6 | MCAR, MAR, MNAR | [lab](labs/lab_week2_session1.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week2_session1_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week2_session1.R) |
| 2 | 7 | Multiple imputation with mice | [lab](labs/lab_week2_session2.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week2_session2_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week2_session2.R) |
| 2 | 8 | Linear mixed models with lme4 | [lab](labs/lab_week2_session3.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week2_session3_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week2_session3.R) |
| 2 | 9 | GLMMs and GEE | [lab](labs/lab_week2_session4.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week2_session4_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week2_session4.R) |
| 2 | 10 | Time series basics | [lab](labs/lab_week2_session5.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week2_session5_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week2_session5.R) |
| 3 | 11 | Time-varying, landmark, immortal-time | [lab](labs/lab_week3_session1.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week3_session1_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week3_session1.R) |
| 3 | 12 | Competing risks and multistate | [lab](labs/lab_week3_session2.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week3_session2_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week3_session2.R) |
| 3 | 13 | DAGs with dagitty | [lab](labs/lab_week3_session3.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week3_session3_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week3_session3.R) |
| 3 | 14 | Propensity scores and IPTW | [lab](labs/lab_week3_session4.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week3_session4_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week3_session4.R) |
| 3 | 15 | G-methods, IV, DiD, RDD; HTE | [lab](labs/lab_week3_session5.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week3_session5_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week3_session5.R) |
| 4 | 16 | Systematic reviews and PRISMA | [lab](labs/lab_week4_session1.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week4_session1_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week4_session1.R) |
| 4 | 17 | Meta-analysis basics | [lab](labs/lab_week4_session2.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week4_session2_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week4_session2.R) |
| 4 | 18 | Network meta-analysis | [lab](labs/lab_week4_session3.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week4_session3_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week4_session3.R) |
| 4 | 19 | SIR / SEIR with deSolve | [lab](labs/lab_week4_session4.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week4_session4_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week4_session4.R) |
| 4 | 20 | Pre-registration and SAPs | [lab](labs/lab_week4_session5.qmd) | [slides](labs/lab_week4_session5_slides.html) | [R](code/lab_week4_session5.R) |
